title: Day Curling
content:
# Day Curling

**Monday Sunrise Curling:**

* **League Type:** Drop-in Recreational. Teams formed by coordinator and vary each session. Anyone who has completed at least basic curling instruction (e.g., Learn to Curl) is welcome to join us. Practice ice is available.
* **Formats:** Varies depending on number of curlers and preferences. We often play Triples, Doubles, 4-person (6 ends), and occasionally formats we make up on the spot. No experience with those formats necessary. Rules will be covered before the game.
* **Draw Time**: 6:45 am to 8:15 am most Mondays
* **Dates**: Check the [Club Calendar](/index.php/events/calendar/month.calendar/) for sessions.
* **Coordinator**: Jeremy Schmidt.
* **Fees**: Free for Triangle Curling Club members. $15 per session for non-members (payable at the Club).
* Sign up required via [Sign-Up Genius](https://www.signupgenius.com/go/5080845A4AD2EA1FC1-51163295-early)

**Tuesday Day Curling:**

* **Draw Time:** 10:00 a.m. to Noon
* **Dates:** Tuesdays
* **League coordinator:** Russell Kandel
* **NOTE:** This league is available for member drop in at no charge.
* Non-members, who have attended a Learn to Curl class or otherwise have previous curling experience, may also drop in and pay $15 before the league start time.
* Please arrive by 9:45 a.m.

**Wednesday Day Curling:**

* **League Type**: Open Format League, teams formed by coordinator. Teams vary by week, individual records cumulate for league winners.
* **Who Can Join**: Individual sign up. You may request a teammate.
* **Draw Time**: 10:15 a.m. to 12:15 pm
* **Dates**: Wednesdays
* **League coordinator**: Doug Brugler
* **Note**: This league **is** available for drop in. Members are welcome to drop in at no charge. Non-members may also drop in and pay $15 before the league start time.

**Friday Sunrise Curling:**

* **League Type:** Drop-in Recreational. Teams formed by coordinator and vary each session. Practice ice is available.
* **Formats:** Varies depending on number of curlers and preferences. We often play Triples, Doubles, 4-person (6 ends), and occasionally formats we make up on the spot. No experience with those formats necessary. Rules will be covered before the game.
* **Draw Time**: 6:45 am to 8:15 am, most Fridays
* **Dates**: Check the [Club Calendar](/index.php/events/calendar/month.calendar/) for sessions.
* **Coordinator**: Patrick Moran.
* **Fees**: Free for Triangle Curling Club members. $15 per session for non-members (payable at the Club).
* Anyone who has completed at least basic curling instruction (e.g., Learn to Curl) is welcome to join us.
* Sign up required via [Sign-Up Genius](https://www.signupgenius.com/go/5080845A4AD2EA1FC1-51163295-early)

**Group Events and Team Building:**

Looking for a team outing or other group event? Check out our [Team Building & Group Events](/index.php/private-events) page. 

---
